economic_notes: Operations impacted by COVID-19 including band office closure and increased member support demands. Entities include energy (Gitchi Animki, Giizis Power), forestry (Maygwayyawk), and contracting (BMI-Maamwigaaboo) ventures. Contract work with Barrick Gold generating over $3M revenue. Investments in Pic Mobert Hydro Inc. ($70.9M cost) and Muskoka Solar LP ($1.8M cost).
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED - auditors unable to obtain sufficient evidence on accounts receivable of a controlled entity under modified equity method; investments in government business partnership/enterprise and accumulated surplus may require adjustment. Financial statements restated (Note 24). Seven entities fully consolidated; two accounted for under modified equity (White Lake LP, BMI-Maamwigaaboo Contracting LP). Net debt position of $12.9M. Long-term debt schedule not fully visible in extracted text; annual debt service based on cash flow repayments. TCA net book value not determinable from extracted text. ISC funding includes amounts per Notes 16 and 18. Total government transfers estimated from identified government funding lines (ISC, FNIHB, CMHC, Ministry of Health, Ministry of Community Family and Children's Services, Ministry of Indigenous Affairs, Ministry of Transportation, Ministry of Education, Ministry of Natural Resources, Industry Canada, Union of Ontario Indians, Anishinabek Employment and Training Services, Kinomaadswin Education Body, Northern Ontario Heritage Fund, Dilico). COVID-19 impact noted on operations.
